title: CLI upload publishes with registry-assigned semver

source.subject: feat(pckg): upload publishes with registry-assigned semver

body:
## Outcome

Upload publishes with registry-assigned semver.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`459e018`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/459e018) — feat(pckg): upload publishes with registry-assigned semver
